posts.title: Blaze Ads Watchdog
posts.text:
[TEST] Blaze Ads Watchdog — Jul 15, 2026 (authority: CLASS_B_ONLY — STANDING_AUTHORITY_v1.0.md unsigned)

Meta (live, account 2158768751536031, MTD Jul 1-15) — "Save the Shave UGC Bill _UGC_070326" spend $282.62, ROAS 0.71 — $75-KILL BREACH, STATUS: BLOCKED (8th day). ~$151.73 burned since first flag 7/9 (L-2026-07-10-001). Kill/revise brief in thread. @will
FATIGUE FLAG (ongoing, first staged Jul 14) — MTD ROAS decay day 4+ (0.84->0.79->0.75->0.71). Frequency 1.53 (stable), CTR 6.05% (stable) — decay is ROAS-only, not frequency+CTR rule. Creative rotation note to 022 pipeline remains open from Jul 14 pass.
Hygiene: duplicate campaign pair (120244295191790118 / 120244294919800118) PAUSED, $0 spend — unresolved.

Amazon PPC — BLIND (2nd regression this week). Supermetrics A/B/C: all failed — Query stalled: data source reported running but no tasks scheduled. Jul 13 one-day success was an aberration; pipeline has regressed (L-2026-07-09-001, contradiction #2). Slicker Brush spend-violation check: NOT RUN. Unrecognized-ASIN (B0GT1H84JM etc.) check: NOT RUN. Partial cover: last known snapshot Jul 14 07:55 AM (Jul 12 attributed sales, Jul 13 keyword ranks) — all prior 033-staged flags (Slicker violation, B0GT1H84JM, kill-band SKUs) remain open with no confirmed action.

Google — $0 / not running (query F completed, empty). Expected.
TikTok — no connector, manual visibility only.

0 Blaze: directives this run. No STG Jarvis persona post observed today.

Staged by BLAZE routine (STG 044 v1.0, TEST MODE)

posts.title: Kill/revise brief — Save the Shave UGC Bill
posts.text:
Kill/revise brief — Save the Shave UGC Bill _UGC_070326
Platform: Meta | Account: 2158768751536031
MTD spend: $282.62 (Jul 1-15, live pull) | MTD ROAS: 0.71 | Days past $75 kill threshold: 8
Burn since first flag (Jul 9, ~$130.89): ~$151.73
Signal: frequency 1.53, CTR 6.05% — audience is clicking, conversion is the gap

KILL: 8 days under 1.0 ROAS, 4-day consecutive MTD decay trajectory, $282.62 invested returning $0.71 per dollar. The strong Jul 11-12 daily performance (ROAS 1.88 / 2.96) has not repeated — Jul 13 and Jul 14 both came in weak (0.37 / ~0.45). Holding is burning ~$15-27/day for uncertain recovery. At this pace: ~$190+ MTD by end of July.

REVISE: CTR 6.05% and frequency 1.53 mean the creative is still being watched and clicked — the issue is post-click (landing page, offer, checkout friction), not creative fatigue. A landing page or offer test could isolate the gap without killing the campaign entirely. If a new creative hook is the fix, that is the 022 pipeline — the Jul 14 creative rotation note is still open there.

@will — reply kill or revise [landing page / new creative / offer] to act. STATUS: OPEN.
